content: Scheduled ER Amount as Percentage of Total

This expression will calculate the Scheduled ER Amount as a percentage of the Annual Salary.

```
If(AnnualSalary=="" || Value(AnnualSalary)==0, 0, Multiply(Divide(Value(ScheduledERAmount), Value(AnnualSalary)), 100))
```
This expression will produce a **Numeric** output.

Suggested column name: **ER Amount as Percent of Salary**

{{SUGGESTED_ACTIONS:Edit this expression|Create new column|Test with my data|Explain this expression}}
